name: smoke
_doc: Dumb end-to-end smoke test: exercises structured output + schema validation, a gate expression, a governed loop (fixpoint + max_iters), a branch on structured output, and a token-gated commit. Each agent is asked to echo a fixed JSON so it runs cheaply on a small/fast model. Run: CWR_BACKEND=claude-code CWR_MODEL=haiku cabal-workflow-runner run examples/smoke.workflow.json --floor g-observed --approve <token>

steps.prompt: Output ONLY this JSON object and nothing else (no prose, no markdown fences): {"severity":"high","observed":true}

body.prompt: Output ONLY this JSON object and nothing else (no prose, no markdown fences): {"done":false,"progressed":false}

then.prompt: Output ONLY this JSON object and nothing else (no prose, no markdown fences): {"ok":true}

else.prompt: Output ONLY this JSON object and nothing else (no prose, no markdown fences): {"noted":true}
